name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large ICMP Packets
notes: This Building Block identifies flows with abnormaly large ICMP packets
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large ICMP Packets on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
when the flow duration is greater than 10 minutes
when the source byte/packet ratio is greater than 1000 bytes/packet
when the source bytes is greater than 1
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Large ICMP Packets on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
AND when the flow duration is greater than 10 minutes
AND when the source byte/packet ratio is greater than 1000 bytes/packet
AND when the source bytes is greater than 1
